title: TransistorExtension
description: Category extension for discrete transistors (BJT NPN/PNP, MOSFET N/P-channel, JFET, IGBT). Layered on top of base per spec §7. Version 1.0. BJT-vs-FET encoded as null fields per inactive type (no oneOf discriminator); pin_assignment populates the active 3 pin numbers per device type (base/collector/emitter for BJT, gate/drain/source for FET). Field union from 2N3904 (NPN BJT, MCC) + IRLML6344 (N-MOSFET, IR/Infineon).

transistor_type.description: Transistor functional category. Drives which optional fields are typically populated (BJT fields null for FET types; FET fields null for BJT types).

vceo_max.description: Collector-Emitter breakdown voltage with base open (V). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries test IC and temperature.

vcbo_max.description: Collector-Base breakdown voltage with emitter open (V). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries test IC.

vebo_max.description: Emitter-Base breakdown voltage with collector open (V). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries test IE.

ic_max.description: Continuous collector current (A). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Condition distinguishes continuous vs pulse if both are published.

hfe.description: DC current gain hFE (dimensionless — unit: null). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Multiple SpecValues for different test IC and VCE conditions; condition string carries the test point.

vce_sat.description: Collector-Emitter saturation voltage (V). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Multiple SpecValues for different IC/IB test conditions.

vbe_sat.description: Base-Emitter saturation voltage (V). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Multiple SpecValues for different IC/IB test conditions.

ft.description: Transition frequency / current gain-bandwidth product (Hz — NOT MHz; store 250MHz as 250e6). BJT only — null for FET/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries IC, VCE, and test frequency.

vds_max.description: Drain-Source breakdown voltage (V). FET/JFET/IGBT only — null for BJT. Found in Absolute Maximum Ratings.

vgs_max.description: Gate-Source maximum voltage (V). FET/JFET only — null for BJT. Bipolar spec (min negative, max positive) typical for MOSFETs.

id_max.description: Continuous drain current (A). FET/IGBT only — null for BJT. Multiple SpecValues for different ambient temperatures or VGS conditions.

rds_on.description: Drain-Source on-resistance (Ω). MOSFET/JFET only — null for BJT/IGBT. Multiple SpecValues for different VGS and ID test conditions.

vgs_th.description: Gate threshold voltage (V). FET/IGBT only — null for BJT. Condition carries VDS=VGS and ID test current.

qg.description: Total gate charge (C — NOT nC; store 6.8nC as 6.8e-9). FET/IGBT only — null for BJT. Condition carries ID, VDS, and VGS test points.

qgd.description: Gate-Drain Miller charge (C — NOT nC; store 2.4nC as 2.4e-9). FET/IGBT only — null for BJT. Condition carries ID, VDS, and VGS test points.

ciss.description: MOSFET input capacitance (F — NOT pF; store 650pF as 6.5e-10). MOSFET only — null for BJT/JFET/IGBT (JFETs use Cgs/Cgd/Cds with different semantics; deferred to v1.5). Condition carries VGS, VDS, and test frequency.

coss.description: MOSFET output capacitance (F — NOT pF). MOSFET only — null for BJT/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries VGS, VDS, and test frequency.

crss.description: MOSFET reverse transfer (Miller) capacitance (F — NOT pF). MOSFET only — null for BJT/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries VGS, VDS, and test frequency.

body_diode_vf.description: Body diode forward voltage (V). MOSFET only — null for BJT/JFET/IGBT. Condition carries IS and temperature.

power_dissipation.description: Continuous power dissipation (W). Applies to all transistor types. Multiple SpecValues for different ambient temperatures (e.g. TA=25°C and TA=70°C).

tj_max.description: Operating junction temperature range (°C). Applies to all transistor types. Populate min with lower bound, max with upper limit.

thermal_resistance.description: Thermal resistance characteristics. Through-hole parts typically have only rtheta_ja; SMD packages often add rtheta_jc.

rtheta_ja.description: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Condition may specify board conditions (e.g. 'Surface mounted on 1-in² Cu board').

rtheta_jc.description: Junction-to-case thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Null when not specified.

rtheta_jl.description: Junction-to-lead thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Common for some SMD packages. Null for most transistor packages.

package.description: Package physical characteristics. body_mm uses nested object shape (Phase 3b option A convention — inner keys align with base.schema.json body_mm shape).

pin_count.description: Number of leads/pins. Typically 3 for transistors.

pitch_mm.description: Lead pitch in millimeters. Null when not applicable (through-hole axial parts).

body_mm.description: Package body dimensions in millimeters. Nested object per Phase 3b option A convention. Inner keys (length/width/height) align with base.schema.json's body_mm shape.

length.description: Body length in millimeters along the longest axis.

width.description: Body width in millimeters along the perpendicular-to-length axis.

height.description: Body height in millimeters (package thickness / standoff direction).

thermal_pad.description: True when the package has an exposed thermal pad on the bottom. Null when not determinable.

pin_assignment.description: Pin number assignment for the transistor's three active terminals. Populate the 3 pins matching the device type (base/collector/emitter for BJT, gate/drain/source for FET/JFET). The inactive 3 are null.

base_pin.description: Base pin number string (BJT only — null for FET/JFET; IGBT uses this field for its gate-input pin).

collector_pin.description: Collector pin number string (BJT/IGBT only — null for FET/JFET).

emitter_pin.description: Emitter pin number string (BJT/IGBT only — null for FET/JFET).

gate_pin.description: Gate pin number string (FET/JFET only — null for BJT/IGBT).

drain_pin.description: Drain pin number string (FET/JFET only — null for BJT/IGBT).

source_pin.description: Source pin number string (FET/JFET only — null for BJT/IGBT).
